headline: Argus Research Maintains Buy on Albemarle, Raises Price Target to $230
summary: Argus Research  analyst Bill Selesky   maintains Albemarle (NYSE:ALB) with a Buy and raises the price target from $185 to $230.

headline: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on Albemarle, Raises Price Target to $253
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Arun Viswanathan   maintains Albemarle (NYSE:ALB) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $245 to $253.

headline: Albemarle Vote Shifts Shareholder Influence While Keeping Strategy On Course
summary: Albemarle (NYSE:ALB) shareholders approved changes to corporate governance at the 2026 annual meeting, including broader rights to call special meetings. Investors narrowly voted against removing certain supermajority voting provisions from the company’s governing documents. The meeting also approved a new 2026 Incentive Plan and executive compensation packages for Albemarle’s leadership team. Albemarle operates as a specialty chemicals company with exposure to sectors such as energy...
